messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## Block Volume

### Block Volume

```hcl
resource "oci_core_volume" "data" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  display_name  = "data-volume"
  size_in_gbs  = 100

  availability_domain = "aaaa:US-ASHBURN-AD-1"

  volume_backup_policy_id = data.oci_core_volume_backup_policies.default.id
}
```

### Performance

```hcl
resource "oci_core_volume" "performance" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  display_name  = "perf-volume"
  size_in_gbs  = 500

  vpus_per_gb = 100
  backup_policy_nsg_ids = []
}
```

### Attachment

```hcl
resource "oci_core_volume_attachment" "attach" {
  attachment_type = "iscsi"
  instance_id    = oci_core_instance.vm.id
  volume_id     = oci_core_volume.data.id
}
```

### ISCSI Connect

```bash
iscsiadm -m node -T $IQN -p $IP:3260 -l
```
